positive: A stylized, symmetrical representation of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features massive, bioluminescent flora that glow in shades of deep indigo, emerald green, and warm coral. The composition should be balanced, drawing the viewer into a deeply magical landscape. Foreground elements include stylized crystalline structures and gentle, flowing streams that reflect the glowing canopy. The aesthetic is a blend of Art Nouveau fantasy and modern minimalist linework, optimized for clean printing on fabric. Strong silhouettes against a gradient background. Dramatic, ethereal volumetric lighting. High contrast, vibrant color palette, perfect for apparel design.
